environment_prompt: A quiet traditional Japanese alley street, empty with no people. Stone-paved road leading straight into the distance. Old wooden houses on the left with warm brown and orange tones. Modern metal-clad buildings on the right with blue-gray walls. Overhead power lines crossing the sky. A yellow safety pole on the right side. Overcast soft daylight. Calm atmosphere. Around the corner of the left-side buildings, a side alley leads off where a person could emerge from. In the distance, a power line pole stands where the road narrows, connected by overhead wires. Above, the overcast sky has room for storm clouds to gather, darken, and produce rain and lightning.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, standing eye-level view looking straight down the alley in one-point perspective with deep depth of field.

interactions.action: A woman in a red dress holding an umbrella walks out from around the corner and stops in the middle of the alley.
The sky suddenly darkens with thick clouds gathering overhead, and light rain begins to fall.
The rain intensifies into a heavy downpour, and a bolt of lightning strikes a distant power line pole. The woman turns her head to look.
